hi: Hello, {name}! 😋 Send /newgame to start a tournament.
help:
🔤 /lang — change language
🎮 /newgame — start new tournament
📋 /cancel — cancel current setup
add_players:
👥 Enter player names, one per line.
When done — press *Start tournament*.
need_players: ⚠️ Add at least 2 players to start.
tournament_started: 🎮 Tournament started! Press on the winner in each match.
no_active: No active tournament. Send /newgame to start.
matches_header: Choose the winner in each match:
state_corrupted: ⚠️ Tournament state is outdated. Please start a new game: /newgame
